accepted_rule: Use one row per household case_id from ihs2_pov.dta after exact case_id joins to ihs2_household.dta and ihs2_exp.dta.
raw_label_evidence: pov label=HH ID variable; household rows=11280; pov rows=11280; exp rows=11280.
numeric_evidence: household case_id distinct=11280/11280; pov distinct=11280/11280; exp distinct=11280/11280; duplicate rows=0.
remaining_blocker: This verifies the household financial universe only; person-level access and climate-linked data remain blocked.

accepted_rule: Use hhwght as household weight, strata as district-by-urban/rural stratum, and V51/V13 as the household EA/PSU identifier for household-level financial estimates.
raw_label_evidence: hhwght=IHS2 HH weight; strata=Stratum: district&urb/rural (30 total); V51=8 digit EA number (DIST+TA+EA) (564 PSUs total); V13=8 digit EA number (DIST+TA+EA) (564 PSUs total).
numeric_evidence: positive hhwght=11280/11280; strata distinct=30; household_psu distinct=564; dist+ta+ea distinct=564.
remaining_blocker: Survey design is verified for household financial estimates; cluster choice must be rechecked for person-level access and future cross-country modeling.

accepted_rule: Use rexpagg as total annual household expenditure denominator for CHE10/CHE25.
raw_label_evidence: rexpagg=Total Annual HH exp; price_index=Spatial and temporal deflator with base national February/March 2004; hhsize=HH Size (based on hh members b08, see IHS2_individ.dta).
remaining_blocker: This accepts CHE10/CHE25 total-budget denominator only; SDG 3.8.2 discretionary-budget denominator remains blocked.

accepted_rule: Use rexp_cat06 as annual real household health OOP aggregate; use rexp_cat061-063 only as component consistency evidence.
raw_label_evidence: rexp_cat06=Health(real) Annual HH exp; rexp_cat061=Health drugs(real) Annual HH exp; rexp_cat062=Health out-patient(real) Annual HH exp; rexp_cat063=Health hospitalization(real) Annual HH exp.
numeric_evidence: rexp_cat06 nonmissing=11280/11280; positive=7765; component diff<=0.01=11280/11280; max diff=0.00294495.
remaining_blocker: Health-module recall-period spending remains context only; promoted CHE uses the survey-team annual household aggregate.

accepted_rule: Construct CHE10 as rexp_cat06 / rexpagg > 0.10 among verified household financial rows.
raw_label_evidence: CHE10 is an older/common total-budget catastrophic health expenditure indicator, not the current SDG 3.8.2 indicator.
remaining_blocker: Do not write the outcome to data/ until missing-code policy, synthesis, and registry write gate pass.

accepted_rule: Construct CHE25 as rexp_cat06 / rexpagg > 0.25 among verified household financial rows.
raw_label_evidence: CHE25 is an older/common total-budget catastrophic health expenditure indicator, not the current SDG 3.8.2 indicator.
remaining_blocker: Do not write the outcome to data/ until missing-code policy, synthesis, and registry write gate pass.

accepted_rule: Do not construct SDG 3.8.2 yet; the current raw file poverty line is documented but not accepted as the current societal poverty-line input.
raw_label_evidence: povline=Poverty Line MK pp pa; price_index=Spatial and temporal deflator with base national February/March 2004.
remaining_blocker: Need PPP/CPI/societal poverty-line policy before SDG 3.8.2 can be marked ready.
